text:

Author: marino

Log:
  textproc/groonga: Upgrade version 3.0.0 => 4.0.4 and stage

  Note that gcc is required for i386 - clang/i386 will coredump on
  FreeBSD 10 and 11.

  Submitted by:	Ports Fury
